about.title: About me
about.description: As a Software Engineering student at MIET University, I'm learning fullstack programming using TypeScript + Vue3 + Nuxt. This project is the result of my preparation, and I'd love to hear your feedback!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Wallflow.
faq.formatsAnswer: Each pack includes wallpapers in multiple resolutions optimized for desktop, mobile, and tablet screens.
faq.commercialAnswer: Wallpapers are licensed for personal use only. Contact us for commercial licensing details.
faq.downloadQuestion: How do I download my pack?
faq.downloadAnswer: Go to your Orders page and click the Download button next to your order.
faq.refundAnswer: Due to the digital nature of the products, we do not offer refunds once a download has been initiated.

hero.headline: Explore your inspire
hero.description: Premium wallpaper packs. Hand-picked collections, instantly downloadable.
